description: Download other community components from the registry at refresh-state time, configured via YAML.

inputs.description: Reads the component registry manifest at refresh-state time.

outputs.description: A single reporting asset summarizing what was installed / skipped.

components.label: Components
components.description: Community component IDs to install. Use `id@ref` (e.g. `postgres_resource@v1.2.0` or `postgres_resource@a1b2c3d`) to pin to a tag, commit SHA, or branch. Plain `id` resolves to the main branch. See https://dagster-component-ui.vercel.app/.

registry_url.label: Registry URL
registry_url.description: Override the default registry manifest URL. Useful for forks or internal mirrors.

install_pip_requirements.label: Install pip requirements
install_pip_requirements.description: If true, run pip install on each downloaded component's requirements.txt at refresh-state time.

asset_name.label: Reporting asset name
asset_name.description: Name of the reporting asset that surfaces install state in the catalog.

group_name.label: Asset group name
group_name.description: Dagster asset group for the reporting asset.

name: Community Component Installer
